highlights:
Advisory AI Data Specialist (FDE Unit) | Jobflarely
...
# Advisory AI Data Specialist (FDE Unit)
...
Advisory AI Data Specialist (FDE Unit)
...
Within the Forward Deployment Engineering (FDE) Unit, the Advisory AI Data Specialist is the data expert who makes customer data ready for AI and GenAI workloads. You focus on removing data bottlenecks so FDE Units can move quickly from concept to live, value-generating AI workloads on Dell infrastructure. You will work with customer teams to map data landscapes, build integrations and pipelines, and configure governance and access controls so that data used in proofs of value is secure, compliant, and scalable to production.
...
Join us to do
...
best work of your career and make a profound social impact as an Advisory AI Data Specialist
...
our Forward Deployment Engineering (FDE) Team in Remote -
...
- What You’ll Achieve
...
Lead data readiness assessments to understand what data is available, how it is used, and how it can support AI use cases
...
Build and improve data pipelines and integrations that deliver AI-ready data for AI and GenAI workloads
...
Design and configure governance and compliance controls that enable secure and compliant use of data for AI
...
Help ensure that PoV data flows are designed with production scale, performance, and operations in mind
...
Partner with AI Architects, AI Strategists, and customer stakeholders to align data work with overall AI priorities and operating models
...
Lead data readiness assessments for FDE engagements, including cataloging data assets, ownership, quality, accessibility, and AI suitability
...
Perform hands-on data integration and transformation work to prepare AI-ready datasets for PoV and production solutions
...
Design and configure data governance and compliance controls (e.g., access control, sensitive data handling, retention, auditability) in line with regulatory and organizational needs
...
Define integration patterns and pipelines that deliver AI-ready data with appropriate security, risk, and privacy controls
...
Ensure PoV pipelines are production-aware from the start, including patterns for monitoring, reliability, performance, and maintainability
...
Collaborate closely with AI Architects to align data flows with the AI software stack and avoid data-related blockers
...
Work with AI Strategists and customer stakeholders to align data work with AI governance frameworks, operating models, and stewardship processes
...
Contribute to documentation such as data flow diagrams, data catalogs, governance artifacts, and runbooks for AI data operations
...
Coach customer data engineers and platform teams on building and maintaining AI-ready data pipelines and governance practices
...
Every Dell Technologies team member brings something unique to the table. Here’s what we are looking for with this role:
...
Typically, 3-8 or more years in data engineering, analytics platforms, or AI data roles within large or complex organizations.
...
Experience running data readiness assessments and preparing data for analytics or AI use cases.
...
Hands-on skills in building data integrations and ETL/ELT processes and transforming raw data into AI-ready formats.
...
Experience configuring data governance and compliance controls for secure and compliant use of data, including sensitive data.
...
Proven ability to scale data pipelines from pilot to production while maintaining performance, reliability, and compliance.
...
Desirable Requirements
...
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Data/Information Management, Engineering, or a related field.
...
Experience delivering production data pipelines and integrations for analytics or AI/ML use cases.
...
Familiarity with modern data platforms, ETL/ELT tooling, and AI/ML-related data patterns (e.g., feature stores, vectorization, RAG-related data flows).
...
Experience collaborating with security, compliance, architecture, and business stakeholders on data and AI initiatives.

results.title: Product Marketing Manager – AI Solutions – Career Development Office | MIT Sloan School of Management
highlights:
Product Marketing Manager – AI Solutions – Career Development Office | MIT Sloan School of Management
...
Dell Technologies, Inc.
...
# Product Marketing Manager – AI Solutions
...
AI Solutions Product Marketing Manager
...
We pride ourselves on being a customer-focused marketing department that puts our customers at the center of everything we do. We work hard to create strong messages that resonate deeply with our target customers to create unparalleled impact and deliver on industry leading value propositions for the best solutions in the industry. As part of the AI Solutions Marketing team, you will own one or more AI solutions end to end from the marketing perspective. You will get to work directly with the leading AI accelerator provider (NVIDIA) as part of your solutions work. From messaging to value proposition, content creation, analyst relations, field marketing alignment, and sales enablement; you will be responsible for the success of your solution area. Join us to do the best work of your career and make a profound social impact as a Sr. Advisor for AI solutions on our AI Solutions Product Marketing team working in Seattle WA, Rond Rock TX, or Hopkinton MA.
...
As an AI Solutions Product Marketing Manager, you will be the key marketing contact on key AI solutions and critical ISVs to Dell; you’ll define what your AI solution is while ensuring the creation, and quality, of your AI solution marketing content. You will be a key player in the success of Dell’s next multibillion dollar portfolio, providing guidance, content, and execution that delivers customer impact and market momentum. You will be a key subject matter expert owning your AI solution’s marketing from ideation, research, content creation, sales enablement, partner collaboration, and field execution. If you love product marketing and are looking to make a big impact in the exciting world of AI, on one of the most important technological revolutions in our lifetime, here is your opportunity!
...
You will:
...
- Define and manage your AI solution value proposition including the value proposition definition and differentiation identification
- Build key AI solution marketing assets including the pitch deck and executive briefing deck
- Expand the portfolio by assessing new developments, technologies, and hardware innovations for inclusion in your AI solution, manage your AI solution criteria, and help name new AI solutions in our area
- Help ensure market impact of your AI solution through work with channel marketing, communications, analyst relations, sales readiness, pre-sales, and account management
- Act as the subject matter expert for your AI solution in interactions with customers and internal stakeholders while serving as a resource for outbound marketing and communications teams
...
- 8+ years of related experience in product/portfolio marketing for business-to-business IT/Tech products
- Strong content and messaging skills including building pitch decks, executive briefing materials, blog creation, public speaking, and other forms of content creation and delivery
- Demonstrated excellence in communicating complex technical topics to both technical and C-level audiences in compelling, innovative, and informative ways while working with cross-functional, geographically dispersed teams
- Someone who can deal with ambiguity, create clarity, inspire confidence, owns outcomes, works well in a team, and has a bias for action
...
Desirable Requirements
...
- BS in a technical field (Computer Science, Engineering, Math, etc.) or marketing; MBA preferred
- Previous experience in, using, or working closely with IT
- AI, ISV, or solutions marketing experience

results.title: VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services | Hirevector
highlights:
Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
# VP, Artificial Intelligence - Products & Services
...
About the Role & TeamIDC is seeking a transformative AI leader to define and execute our enterprise-wide AI strategy—embedding cutting-edge artificial intelligence across both internal operations and customer-facing products. This is a rare opportunity to shape how a global data and intelligence company harnesses AI, from agentic workflows and large language models to predictive analytics and AI-native product experiences. Reporting directly to the CTO, the VP of AI will lead a high-performing technical team, partner across business units, and drive measurable business impact through intelligent, responsible, and scalable AI solutions. The ideal candidate combines deep technical expertise in modern AI—including generative AI, LLMs, and agentic systems—with the strategic acumen to align AI investments to revenue growth and competitive differentiation. IDC sits at the intersection of proprietary data, expert human insight, and global technology reach—an ideal foundation for AI transformation. Key opportunity areas include: AI-augmented research & analyst productivity — deploying LLM-powered tools to accelerate data synthesis, report generation, and market forecasting. Intelligent data products — embedding predictive models and AI-driven insights directly into IDC's subscription and advisory offerings. Agentic content & marketing workflows — leveraging generative AI to personalize content, automate content pipelines, and optimize Foundry's MarTech capabilities. Enterprise AI infrastructure — building shared platforms, APIs, and MLOps practices that enable AI adoption at scale across all IDC business units. What You’ll Do
...
AI Strategy & Vision: Partner with the CEO, CTO, CIO, and business unit heads to define IDC's multi-year AI roadmap—spanning generative AI, agentic systems, predictive analytics, and AI-native product development. Technical Leadership: Architect and oversee IDC's AI platform and infrastructure, ensuring scalability, security, and alignment with enterprise data strategy. Product Delivery: Develop and execute IDC’s approach to agentic AI technology, thereby delivering the centerpiece of IDC Quanta, our cross-channel technology intelligence layer. Team Building: Recruit, develop, and retain a world-class AI team spanning ML engineers, data scientists, AI product managers, and MLOps specialists. Stakeholder Alignment: Translate complex AI capabilities into clear business value for executives and department heads; maintain transparent goals and resource planning. Ecosystem & Partnerships: Evaluate and manage AI technology partnerships, vendor relationships, and open-source contributions to accelerate IDC's AI capabilities. What You Bring
...
PhD. or Master's degree in Computer Science, AI/ML, Statistics, or a related quantitative field (or equivalent experience).
...
7+ years of experience in applied machine learning, AI engineering, or data science—with at least 3 years in senior technical leadership roles.
...
impact (revenue growth,
...
reduction, or product differentiation).
...
Deep expertise in modern AI/ML and agentic/generative systems design.
...
Hands-on fluency with generative AI technologies: LLM fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), prompt engineering, and agentic frameworks (e.g., LangChain, LlamaIndex, AutoGen).
...
Strong engineering foundation: Python, SQL, cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI, or Azure ML), and modern MLOps practices (CI/CD, model monitoring, feature stores).
...
Tech industries.
...
Familiarity with knowledge graphs, semantic search, or AI applications in content and market research workflows.
...
Experience with responsible AI frameworks, model governance, and AI regulatory compliance (EU AI Act, NIST AI RMF).
...
Track record of building AI developer platforms or shared ML infrastructure used by multiple product teams.

GenAI Software Engineer I at [Dell Technologies](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dell)
...
I am a software engineer with a strong focus on Generative AI. Currently, I am working on a project that leverages AI to enhance content based on technical specifications for external marketplaces. My role involves using PGVector for embedding and similarity search, Loguru for efficient logging, Langfuse for prompt modularity, and pytest for automated testing. We also employ prompt engineering strategies to fine-tune our AI models' performance. I have extensive experience in full-stack development, focusing on C#,.NET, Blazor, Angular 2+, and MSSQL. I am well-versed in Behavior-Driven Development (BDD) and DevOps practices, including GitLab CI/CD, automated pipelines, automated tests, blue-green deployments, SonarQube, and Checkmarx. My background includes infrastructure and networking knowledge, with hands-on experience in cloud environments and designing cloud-native solutions. I am used to collaborating with international teams and developing resilient enterprise applications. I am passionate about technology and innovation, particularly Linux and Open Source. #### GenAI Software Engineer I (Current)
...
As a Software Engineer Intern on the GenAI Team, I collaborate on developing a tool that leverages Generative AI to enhance content based on technical specifications for publication on external marketplaces. Our tech stack includes: PGVector : A robust vector database for embedding and similarity search, crucial for managing and querying high-dimensional data involved in complex generative AI structures. Loguru : A Python logging library that simplifies tracking, debugging, and maintaining application health. Langfuse : A tool for prompt modularity, allowing flexible and dynamic generation of content based on varying technical inputs. pytest : A testing framework that ensures our code is reliable and performs as expected through comprehensive automated testing. In addition to leveraging these technologies, we employ strategies of prompt engineering to optimize the interactions with our generative AI models, ensuring accurate and relevant content generation. These technologies and strategies empower us to efficiently generate high-quality, market-ready content, boosting Dell's presence on various marketplaces. Show less

results.title: Ahmed Nawaz Shaik
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer | Python | GenAI (RAG, LLMs) | FastAPI | AWS | Building Scalable ML Systems | Open to Opportunities
...
AI Ml Engineer at [Dell Technologies](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dell)
...
AI/ML Engineer with 3+ years of experience designing and deploying production-grade machine learning systems and data-driven applications across enterprise and consulting environments. I specialize in building scalable solutions using Python, with a strong focus on end-to-end ML workflows—from data ingestion and feature engineering to model deployment and real-time inference. In my current role at Dell Technologies, I work on developing and optimizing ML systems that process large-scale datasets and support real-time decision-making. I’ve built and deployed FastAPI-based services, reduced data processing overhead through efficient pipelines, and implemented Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems using embeddings and LLMs to enable intelligent knowledge retrieval across internal datasets. Previously at KPMG, I worked on multiple client projects where I developed predictive models, built ETL pipelines, and automated data workflows—helping teams reduce manual effort and improve reporting efficiency. My experience spans structured data modeling, NLP applications, and foundational deep learning. I’m particularly interested in Generative AI, scalable ML systems, and backend-driven AI applications. I enjoy solving practical business problems using machine learning and continuously exploring new advancements in LLMs and AI infrastructure. Core Skills: • Python, SQL, FastAPI, REST APIs • Machine Learning: XGBoost, Random Forest, Model Optimization • Generative AI: RAG, LLMs, OpenAI APIs, Embeddings, LangChain • Data Engineering: ETL Pipelines, Airflow, Spark • MLOps: Docker, MLflow, CI/CD, Model Deployment & Monitoring • Cloud: AWS (S3, Lambda, Redshift) I am currently open to new opportunities as an AI/ML Engineer or Python Developer, where I can contribute to building impactful, scalable AI solutions.

### What is an AI Engineer at Dell Technologies?

As an **AI Engineer** at **Dell Technologies**, you are at the forefront of integrating cutting-edge machine learning and generative AI into the global infrastructure that powers modern business. You will bridge the gap between theoretical data science models and scalable, production-grade systems. Your work directly impacts how **Dell Technologies** delivers value to its clients, ranging from optimizing supply chain logistics to developing intelligent automation for enterprise hardware management.

Success in this position means you are capable of navigating complex, large-scale datasets while collaborating across cross-functional teams to solve tangible, high-stakes business challenges.

results.title: Tathagata Banerjee
highlights:
Senior Software Engineer at [Dell Technologies](https://www.linkedin.com/company/dell)
...
Senior engineer focused on the intersection of AI/ML, NLP, and Quantum Computing, building on 8 years of experience across backend development, automation frameworks, devops pipelines, and security-driven engineering. Over the last 3+ years, I’ve worked on NLP-based enhancements for enterprise content systems, including auto-tagging, lead-monitoring intelligence, and metadata extraction. My current work spans deep learning, LLMs, tensor networks, QNLP, quantum algorithms, and quantum machine learning, with hands-on experimentation in PyTorch, TensorFlow, and PennyLane. With a Certified Ethical Hacker background, I apply a strong focus on model robustness, ML safety, and trustworthy AI development. I’m exploring opportunities in: • AI/ML Engineering & NLP Engineering • Model evaluation, LLM testing, ML Ops & ML safety • Quantum Machine Learning and hybrid algorithms • Research engineering in AI and quantum domains I’m driven by challenges that push computing forward, whether through smarter AI systems, language-first interfaces, or quantum-enhanced models. Open to collaborations and roles across these areas.
...
### [Dell Technologies](
...
.linkedin.com
...
ML Lead Routing Project o Played a key role in developing a hybrid machine learning solution to classify incoming comments from Dell Forms into four categories: Inbound Sales, Small Business, Support, and Spam. o Designed and implemented a multi-stage classification pipeline that combined rule-based filtering for accurate spam detection with advanced deep learning models—including BERT, RoBERTa, and XLNet—to classify Sales and Support queries with high precision. o Integrated the ML models with rule-based logic to ensure robust final classification and improve lead routing efficiency, enhancing customer experience & operational workflow. o Collaborated with cross-functional teams to deploy the solution within existing systems, demonstrating practical expertise in NLP model application, data preprocessing, and real-world ML integration.

...

...
API to enhance user interaction and support.
...
I developed an end-to-end NLP pipeline to classify sentiment in noisy Twitter data, successfully fine-tuning a DistilBERT Transformer model to achieve 87.28% accuracy. This project addressed the challenge of understanding complex social media language by managing the entire machine learning lifecycle, from raw, unlabeled data to a high-performance predictive model. Key Actions & Highlights: Data Foundation: Engineered a semi-supervised pipeline using VADER and meticulous manual verification to create a high-quality labeled dataset from scratch, ensuring the model was built on reliable ground-truth data. Advanced Modeling: Made the strategic decision to leverage a state-of-the-art Transformer over a traditional RNN. I fine-tuned the DistilBERT model using Hugging Face and TensorFlow, adapting its powerful, pre-trained language understanding for this specialized task. Rigorous Training: Implemented best practices such as EarlyStopping to prevent overfitting and setting random seeds for reproducibility, ensuring the model was both robust and scientifically sound. Comprehensive Evaluation: Validated the final model's effectiveness using a test set and a full suite of metrics, including a classification report and confusion matrix, demonstrating a well-balanced performance in identifying both positive and negative sentiments. This project showcases my ability to architect and execute a complete NLP solution, demonstrating strong skills in data preprocessing, transfer learning, and model optimization. Technologies: Python, TensorFlow, Keras, Hugging Face Transformers, Scikit-learn, Pandas, NLTK Show less

About the position

The PositionWhy GenentechWe're passionate about delivering on Our Promise to improve the lives of patients and create healthier communities for all. We foster a culture of inclusivity, integrity and creativity while boldly pursuing answers to the world's most complex health challenges and transforming society.Genentech's Data, Digital, and Analytics (DDA) team is dedicated to solving complex healthcare challenges and improving patient outcomes. DDA empowers business partners across Commercial, Medical, and Government Affairs (CMG) to make impactful decisions by leveraging data, analytics, and AI/ML to enable fast, targeted actions in rapidly evolving business contexts.DDA fosters a unified understanding of customers, actions, and outcomes by transforming the business insight supply chain from the traditional reactive service model to a modern proactive product model, which integrates analytics and insights seamlessly into CMG's evolving digital, data, and automation platforms, creating scalable solutions and eliminating silos. In DDA, you will work as a trusted, objective advisor and expert, recommending critical decisions and actions to be taken with credibility and a focus on driving measurable impact. You will be part of a diverse, inclusive team that reflects the world we serve, thriving in a welcoming culture built on collaboration and innovation.The OpportunityThe Sr. Data Scientist - Generative AI Application Specialist is responsible for building fundamental agentic capabilities and high-level business applications within a fast-moving, experimental environment. This role bridges the gap between technical infrastructure and user experience, collaborating with infrastructure teams to design agents and partnering with product owners to ensure optimal development approaches for desired UX. As a subject matter expert, you will stay at the forefront of Generative AI models and capabilities, influencing technical priorities in a complex enterprise environment while representing the team across the global Roche organization.

Senior ML engineer on Walmart's Catalog Data Science team building production GenAI and deep learning models for product attribute extraction, classification, and catalog optimization at petabyte scale.

About Team The Catalog Data Science Team at Walmart Global Tech is focused on using the latest research in generative AI (GenAI), artificial intelligence (AI), machine learning (ML), statistics, deep learning, computer vision and optimization to implement solutions that ensure Walmart’s product catalog is accurate, complete, and optimized for customer experience. Our team tackles complex data science and ML engineering challenges related to product classification, attribute extraction, trust & safety, and catalog optimization, empowering next-generation retail use cases. We take pride in writing solid production code in Python, deploying and supporting model services and pipelines, and pushing the boundaries in latency, throughput, and scalability.
...
As a Senior Data Scientist (Machine Learning Engineer) on the Catalog Data Quality team, you will collaborate with other Data Scientists and ML Engineers to develop, deploy, and scale machine learning models in production to extract attributes from product information. You will play a key role in supporting the attribute extraction platform and catalog data quality solutions — adding capabilities and driving adoption of GenAI-powered solutions to increase the coverage and accuracy of the Walmart's product catalog. The Data Science and ML Engineering community at Walmart Global Tech is active in most of the Hack events, utilizing the petabytes of data at our disposal, to build some of the coolest ideas. All the work we do at Walmart Global Tech will eventually benefit our operations & our associates, helping Customers Save Money to Live Better.

...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and leadership to support data driven decision making
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...

...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects

...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle

- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence

Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.
